name: Fiddleheads on Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fiddleheads and drain any excess liquid.
2. Arrange the cooked fiddleheads on squares of toasted bread or halved toasted English muffins.
3. Pour white sauce over the fiddleheads, adding diced hard-boiled eggs to taste.
4. Sprinkle with paprika for serving.
5. Alternatively, arrange cooked fiddleheads on toast and top each serving with crisp-fried bacon slices.
6. Add a generous amount of white sauce, optionally including cheese, to serve.
7. For another variation, roll the cooked fiddleheads in thin ham slices, then broil until lightly browned. Serve over toasted bread or halved English muffins with white sauce poured over the top.
